title: helichrysum radicans
intro: Helichrysum radicans, also known as Everlasting Small Leaf or Small Leaf Everlasting, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum radicans include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting immune function and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, tincture, and essential oil, which can be used to address various health issues and promote overall well-being.
